debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
x : PersistenceSubmodule M
hx : x ∈ ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN
a : PersistenceSubmodule M
ha : a ≤ x
ha' : a ≤ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})
⊢ a ≤ ⊥

classical
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx with ⟨N, hx⟩
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx with ⟨hN, hx⟩
    have hx' : x ∈ B N hN := by simpa using hx
    have ha'' : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      refine le_trans ha' ?_
      refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
      intro y hy
      rcases hy with ⟨hyU, hyx⟩
      rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hyU with ⟨N', hyU⟩
      rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hyU with ⟨hN', hyU⟩
      exact ⟨⟨N', ⟨hN', hyU⟩⟩, by simpa using hyx⟩
    exact (hB' N hN x hx' a ha ha'')

classical
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.1 hx with ⟨N, hx⟩
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.1 hx with ⟨hN, hx⟩
    have hxN : x = N := by
      have hx_le : x ≤ N := by
        exact le_sSup_of_le hx le_rfl
      have hN_le : N ≤ x := by
        have : N ≤ sSup (B N hN) := by
          rw [← hB N hN]
        exact (this.trans <| sSup_le fun b hb ↦ le_trans (le_sSup_of_le hb le_rfl) (le_sSup_of_le hx le_rfl))
      exact le_antisymm hx_le hN_le
    subst hxN
    have ha_in : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have hsubset :
          (B N hN \ {x}) ⊆ ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := by
        intro b hb
        refine ⟨?_, hb.2⟩
        refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hN, hb.1⟩⟩
      exact ha'.trans (sSup_le_sSup hsubset)
    have hdisj : Disjoint x (sSup (B N hN \ {x})) := by
      refine (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup hx ?_ ?_
      · intro b hb
        exact hb.1
      · intro hx'
        exact hx'.2 (Set.mem_singleton x)
    have : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := le_inf ha ha_in
    exact this.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hdisj

classical
    have hx' :
        ∃ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), x ∈ B N hN := by
      simpa [Set.mem_iUnion] using hx
    rcases hx' with ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩
    have hxN : x ≤ N := by
      have : B N hN ≤ N := by
        have : sSup (B N hN) ≤ N := by
          simpa [hB N hN]
        exact fun y hy => (le_sSup hy).trans this
      exact this hxB
    have haN : a ≤ N := le_trans ha hxN
    have ha'_in : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      refine le_trans ha' ?_
      refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
      intro y hy
      rcases hy with ⟨hyU, hyx⟩
      have hyU' : ∃ (N' : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN' : N' ∈ D), y ∈ B N' hN' := by
        simpa [Set.mem_iUnion] using hyU
      rcases hyU' with ⟨N', hN', hyB⟩
      have h_eq : N' = N := by
        have hdisj : Disjoint N' N := by
          by_cases h : N' = N
          · simpa [h]
          ·
            let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {N', N}
            have hs : s ⊆ (SetLike.coe D) := by
              intro Z hZ
              rcases hZ with ⟨hZ⟩
              · exact hZ ▸ hN'
              · subst Z
                exact hN
            exact (sSupIndep_pair h).mp (sSupIndep.mono D.sSupIndep' hs)
        have hyN' : y ≤ N' := by
          have : B N' hN' ≤ N' := by
            have : sSup (B N' hN') ≤ N' := by
              simpa [hB N' hN']
            exact fun z hz => (le_sSup hz).trans this
          exact this hyB
        have hyN : y ≤ N := by
          have : B N hN ≤ N := by
            have : sSup (B N hN) ≤ N := by
              simpa [hB N hN]
            exact fun z hz => (le_sSup hz).trans this
          -- we don't know y ∈ B N hN here; use hyU path later; so just use hyN' and disjointness
          exact (hyN'.trans (le_sup_left : N' ≤ N' ⊔ N)).trans (le_trans (le_sup_right : N ≤ N' ⊔ N) (le_rfl))
        -- deduce y = ⊥ if N' ≠ N, contradicting hyx after mapping; easier: show N'=N from y≠⊥? not available
        -- instead use D.sSupIndep to force N'=N since y ≤ N' and y ≤ N and y ∈ J? not.
        -- Use disjointness: if N' ≠ N then N' ⊓ N = ⊥, so y ≤ ⊥, hence y=⊥; but then y ≠ x doesn't help.
        by_contra hne
        have hdisj' : Disjoint N' N := by
          let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {N', N}
          have hs : s ⊆ (SetLike.coe D) := by
            intro Z hZ
            rcases hZ with ⟨hZ⟩
            · exact hZ ▸ hN'
            · subst Z
              exact hN
          exact (sSupIndep_pair hne).mp (sSupIndep.mono D.sSupIndep' hs)
        have hy_le_bot : y ≤ (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          have : y ≤ N' ⊓ N := le_inf hyN' (by
            have : B N hN ≤ N := by
              have : sSup (B N hN) ≤ N := by
                simpa [hB N hN]
              exact fun z hz => (le_sSup hz).trans this
            -- y ≤ N follows from hyU via hyU' giving N' not N; can't
            -- but we can get y ≤ N because hyU' gives membership in B N' only; so instead:
            -- use ha' later? not.
            exact le_trans (le_sSup hyB) (by simpa [hB N' hN'] using le_rfl))
          exact this.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hdisj'
        have : y = (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by simpa [le_bot_iff] using hy_le_bot
        subst this
        exact hne (by rfl)
      subst h_eq
      exact hyx
    have ha_bot : a ≤ (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
      have hdisj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := by
        exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup (hB' N hN) hxB (by
          intro y hy
          exact hy.1) (by
            intro hx'
            exact (hx'.2 rfl)))
      exact ha.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hdisj |> fun h => (le_inf le_rfl ha'_in).trans h)
    simpa using ha_bot

rcases Set.mem_iUnion.1 hx with ⟨N, hxN⟩
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.1 hxN with ⟨hN, hxB⟩
    have hx_sub : x ⊆ N := by
      have : x ∈ B N hN := hxB
      have hle : sSup (B N hN) ≤ N := sSup_le (fun y hy => le_of_lt? sorry)
      -- but we can avoid: since sSup (B N hN) = N, every element of B N hN ≤ N

    have hx_le_N : x ≤ N := by

      have : x ≤ sSup (B N hN) := le_sSup this

    have haN : a ≤ N := le_trans ha hx_le_N
    have haB : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      have hsubset :

        rcases Set.mem_iUnion.1 hyN' with ⟨hN', hyB'⟩
        exact (le_sSup hyB') 
      -- This is wrong type; fix: want inequality between sSup sets. We'll use monotonicity:
      have hmono :

        apply sSup_le_sSup
        intro y hy
        exact by
          have : y ∈ ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN := hy.1
          -- y could come from other N', but still y ≤ sSup (B N hN) holds? not.
          -- abandon and use disjointness directly with N and its complement:
          sorry
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      exact sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup (by
        -- need sSupIndep of big union; use hB' and D.sSupIndep? too hard here
        sorry) hx
    exact (disjoint_iff.mp h_disj).2 ha ha'

have h_indep := hB' N hxD
      have := h_indep (by simpa using hxB) ha ha''

classical
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx with ⟨N, hx⟩
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx with ⟨hN, hx⟩
    have hx' : x ∈ B N hN := hx
    have ha'' : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      have h_le : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
        refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
        intro y hy
        rcases hy with ⟨hyU, hyx⟩
        rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hyU with ⟨N', hyU⟩
        rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hyU with ⟨hN', hyU⟩
        have hNN' : N' = N := by
          have hyU' : y ∈ ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN := by
            exact Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN', hyU⟩
          have hyN' : y ≤ N' := by
            rw [hB N' hN']
            exact le_trans (le_sSup hyU') (le_rfl)
          have hyN : y ≤ N := by
            rw [hB N hN]
            exact le_trans (le_sSup hyU') (le_rfl)
          have hN'_mem : N' ∈ D := hN'
          have hN_mem : N ∈ D := hN
          have h_disj : Disjoint N' N := by
            by_cases hEq : N' = N
            · simpa [hEq] using disjoint_self
            ·
              let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {N', N}
              have hs : s ⊆ (SetLike.coe D) := by
                intro Z hZ
                rcases hZ with ⟨hZ⟩
                · exact hZ ▸ hN'_mem
                subst Z
                exact hN_mem
              exact (sSupIndep_pair (by simpa using hEq)).mp (sSupIndep.mono D.sSupIndep' hs)
          have : y ≤ (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
            have : y ≤ N' ⊓ N := le_inf hyN' hyN
            exact this.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj)
          have : y = (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
            simpa [le_bot_iff] using this
          have : y = ⊥ := this
          have : N' = N := by
            exfalso
            have : y ∈ (B N' hN') := hyU
            have : y ≠ ⊥ := by
              intro hbot
              have : (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) ∈ B N' hN' := by simpa [hbot] using this
              exact hB'' N' hN' this
            exact this (by simpa [this] using rfl)
          exact this
        subst hNN'
        exact ⟨hyU, hyx⟩
      exact le_trans ha' h_le
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup (hB' N hN) hx' (by intro y hy; exact hy.1) (by
        intro hxmem
        exact (hxmem.2 rfl)))
    have : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha ha''
    have : a ≤ (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := this.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj)
    simpa [bot_eq_zero] using this

classical
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hxN⟩
    rcases hxN with ⟨hN, hxB⟩
    have hxD : N ∈ D := hN
    have hx_in : x ∈ B N hxD := hxB
    have hx_le_N : x ≤ N := le_sSup_of_le hx_in le_rfl
    have haN : a ≤ N := ha.trans hx_le_N
    have ha'B : a ≤ sSup ((B N hxD) \ {x}) := by
      have h_sub :
          (B N hxD \ {x}) ⊆ ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := by

        refine ⟨?_, hy.2⟩
        refine Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, ?_⟩
        refine Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hxD, ?_⟩
        exact hy.1
      exact ha'.trans (sSup_le_sSup h_sub)
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hxD) \ {x})) :=
      (hB' N hxD) x hx_in
    have ha_inf : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hxD) \ {x}) := le_inf ha ha'B
    have : a ≤ ⊥ := ha_inf.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj)
    simpa using this

classical
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx with ⟨N, hx⟩
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.mp hx with ⟨hN, hx⟩
    have hxB : x ∈ B N hN := hx
    have hxU : x ∈ (⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) := by
      refine Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, ?_⟩
      refine Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, ?_⟩
      exact hxB
    have hxnot : x ∉ (⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) \ {x} := by
      intro hx'
      exact hx'.2 rfl
    have ha'_B : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have hsubset : (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x} ⊆ (B N hN) ∪ ((⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) \ {x}) := by
        intro y hy
        exact Or.inr hy
      have : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) ∪ ((⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) \ {x})) := by
        exact ha'.trans (sSup_le_sSup hsubset)
      have hsplit :
          sSup ((B N hN) ∪ ((⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) \ {x})) =
            sSup (B N hN) ⊔ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) \ {x}) := by
        simp [sSup_union]
      have hx_disj :
          Disjoint (sSup (B N hN \ {x})) (x) := by
        have hx' : x ∉ (B N hN \ {x}) := by
          intro hx'
          exact hx'.2 rfl
        simpa [disjoint_comm] using (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup (hB' N hN) hxB (Set.diff_subset) hx')
      have ha_le_sSupB : a ≤ sSup (B N hN) := ha.trans (le_sSup hxB)
      have ha_le_xsup : a ≤ x ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
        have : sSup (B N hN) = x ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
          have : sSup (B N hN) = sSup ({x} ∪ (B N hN \ {x})) := by
            ext y; constructor
            · intro hy
              by_cases hxy : y = x
              · exact le_sSup_of_le (by simp [hxy]) (by simpa [hxy])
              · have : y ∈ B N hN \ {x} := by
                  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                  · exact hy
                  · intro hyx; exact hxy hyx
                exact le_sSup_of_le (by simp [this]) (le_rfl)
            · intro hy
              rcases (le_sSup_iff.mp hy) with ⟨z, hz, hyz⟩
              rcases hz with hz | hz
              · simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hyz.trans (le_of_eq (by simpa using hz))
              · exact hyz.trans (le_sSup hz.1)
          have : sSup ({x} ∪ (B N hN \ {x})) = sSup ({x} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
            simpa [sSup_union]
          simpa [sSup_singleton] using (this.trans (by simp))
        simpa [this, sup_assoc, sup_left_comm, sup_comm] using ha_le_sSupB
      have ha_le_sSupdiff : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
        have hx_disj' : Disjoint x (sSup (B N hN \ {x})) := by simpa [disjoint_comm] using hx_disj
        have : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := le_inf ha (ha_le_xsup.trans (by
          simpa [sup_comm, sup_left_comm, sup_assoc] using le_sup_right))
        have : a ≤ ⊥ := this.trans (by
          have : x ⊓ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hx_disj'
          simpa [inf_comm] using this)
        exact this
      exact ha_le_sSupdiff
    have ha'_U : a ≤ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := ha'
    have hx_disjU : Disjoint x (sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      have : x ∉ ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := hxnot
      exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup (sSupIndep := by
        have hmono : (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) ⊆ (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) := fun _ h => h
        exact sSupIndep.mono (by
          intro y hy b hb hb'
          have : Disjoint b (sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {b})) := by
            exact sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup (by
              simpa using (sSupIndep.mono D.sSupIndep' (by intro z hz; exact hz))) hb (Set.diff_subset) hb'
          exact this) hmono) hxU (Set.diff_subset) this
    have hle : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha ha'
    have : a ≤ ⊥ := hle.trans (by
      have : x ⊓ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ ⊥ := disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hx_disjU
      exact this)
    exact this

simpa using (D.sSupIndep' x (by

classical
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hxN⟩

    have hxN' : x ≤ N := by

    have haN : a ≤ N := le_trans ha hxN'
    have h_sSup_le_N : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ N := by
      refine sSup_le ?_
      intro y hy
      rcases hy with ⟨hyU, hyx⟩
      rcases hyU with ⟨N', hyN'⟩
      rcases hyN' with ⟨hN', hyB'⟩
      have hy_le_N' : y ≤ N' := le_sSup hyB'
      have hy_disj : Disjoint N N' := by
        have : N ≠ N' := by
          intro hEq
          apply hyx
          subst hEq
          exact hyB'
        exact (sSupIndep_pair this).1 (sSupIndep.mono D.sSupIndep' (by
          intro z hz
          rcases hz with ⟨hz⟩
          · exact hz ▸ hN
          · subst z
            exact hN')) 
      have : y ≤ ⊥ := by
        have : y ≤ N ⊓ N' := le_inf (hy_le_N'.trans ?_) hy_le_N'
        · exact this.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp (hy_disj) )
        · exact le_rfl
      exact le_trans (le_of_eq (by simpa using this)) bot_le
    have ha' : a ≤ N := le_trans ha' h_sSup_le_N
    have h_disj : Disjoint x (sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      refine (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup ?_ hx ?_ ?_)
      · exact (hB' N hN)
      · intro y hy
        exact hy.1
      · intro hxmem
        exact ha'.1 (by simpa using hxmem)
    have : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha ha'
    exact this.trans (disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj)

have : Disjoint x (sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})) := by
      exact sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup (s := ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) (by
        intro i hi; simpa using hi) (by simpa using hx) (by
        intro y hy
        exact hy.1)
    have : Disjoint a ⊥ := by
      refine disjoint_bot_right
    exact le_bot_iff.mp (ha.trans bot_le)

    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.1 hx with ⟨N, hx⟩

    have hbot : x ⊓ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) = ⊥ := by

classical
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.1 hx with ⟨N, hx⟩
    rcases Set.mem_iUnion.1 hx with ⟨hN, hx⟩
    have hxB : x ∈ B N hN := hx
    have hx_in : x ∈ (⋃ N, ⋃ hN : N ∈ D, B N hN) := by
      exact Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hN, hxB⟩⟩
    have ha'_B : a ≤ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := by
      refine le_trans ha' ?_
      refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
      intro y hy
      rcases hy with ⟨hyU, hyx⟩
      rcases Set.mem_iUnion.1 hyU with ⟨N', hyU⟩
      rcases Set.mem_iUnion.1 hyU with ⟨hN', hyU⟩
      exact Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨N', Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hN', ⟨hyU, hyx⟩⟩⟩
    have haB : a ≤ x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) := le_inf ha ha'_B
    have hdisj : Disjoint x (sSup ((B N hN) \ {x})) :=
      sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup (hB' N hN) hxB (by intro y hy; exact hy.1) (by simp)
    have : x ⊓ sSup ((B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) :=
      disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp hdisj
    exact le_trans haB this
